name: First American Bank And Trust
description_short: First American Bank and Trust is a Louisiana-based community bank established in 1910, offering personal and commercial banking services across 25+ branches in the greater New Orleans and Baton Rouge regions.
description_long:
First American Bank and Trust has operated as a regional financial institution since 1910, positioning itself as a community-focused alternative to larger national banks. The company maintains a network of 25+ branches throughout Louisiana, with locations spanning from Baton Rouge to the greater New Orleans area, including communities like Vacherie, Donaldsonville, Thibodaux, Houma, and Metairie.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of personal and commercial banking products. On the consumer side, they provide checking and savings accounts (advertised as openable online in 10 minutes), MasterCard and Visa credit cards with ScoreCard Rewards program, MasterCard debit cards with BRELLA fraud protection, and various loan products including personal loans, mortgages, home equity lines of credit (HELOCs), and commercial loans. Their digital offerings include online banking access.

First American differentiates itself through emphasizing personalized, relationship-based banking. Customer testimonials consistently highlight the contrast between First American's community-oriented service model and the perceived impersonal nature of larger national banks. Long-term customers (cited tenures of 25+ years and since 1971) describe feeling valued and appreciated as individuals rather than account numbers. The bank explicitly markets itself as a "hometown bank" where customers are treated "like a neighbor."

While the website content presents compelling community banking credentials and longevity, prospective customers should note that detailed fee structures, interest rates, loan terms, and specific account requirements are not transparently disclosed on the available website content. The bank appears to operate exclusively in Louisiana with no online/national presence, which limits accessibility for customers outside their service area.
services: MasterCard credit cards with ScoreCard Rewards
Visa credit cards with ScoreCard Rewards
MasterCard debit cards with BRELLA fraud protection
Branch-based financial services and lending consultation
Coin counting services (mentioned in customer testimonial)
pros: Established 1910 with 114+ years of banking history and stability
Extensive local branch network with 25+ locations across Louisiana
Online account opening capability in as little as 10 minutes
Multiple loan products including personal, mortgage, HELOC, and commercial options
Debit card fraud protection through BRELLA program
Credit card rewards program (ScoreCard Rewards) with MasterCard and Visa options
Consistent positive customer testimonials citing 25-50+ year relationships
cons: Geographic limitation: operates only in Louisiana with no national or online-only banking options
Website lacks transparent fee schedules, interest rate information, and specific loan terms
No advertised mobile app or detailed digital banking features beyond online banking login
Limited information about minimum balance requirements and account opening requirements
No competitive rate or product comparison data available on website
best_for: Louisiana residents seeking personalized, relationship-based community banking
Borrowers in the bank's service area looking for multiple loan product options from one institution
Long-term customers valuing consistency and personal recognition from their financial institution
Small business owners and commercial borrowers in Louisiana seeking local lending relationships
diagnosis: First American Bank and Trust is best suited for Louisiana residents within their 25+ branch service area who prioritize personalized community banking relationships and comprehensive loan product offerings. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation to Louisiana and lack of transparent online rate/fee information, making it unsuitable for customers outside their service territory or those preferring full digital banking transparency.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
